content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_ldw
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.vehicle') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE silver.vehicle
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE silver.vehicle
WITH(
    DATA_SOURCE = electric_vehicle_source,
    LOCATION = 'silver/vehicle',
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_file_format
) 
AS
    SELECT vehicle_id, vin, model_year, make, model, electric_range, base_MSRP AS base_msrp,
    vehiche_type_id, cafv_eligibility_id, 
    CAST(SUBSTRING(
        vehicle_location, 
        CHARINDEX(' ', vehicle_location) +2,
        CHARINDEX(' ', vehicle_location, CHARINDEX(' ', vehicle_location)+1) -  CHARINDEX(' ',vehicle_location)-1
    )AS FLOAT
    )AS longitude,
    CAST(SUBSTRING(
        vehicle_location, 
        CHARINDEX(' ', vehicle_location, CHARINDEX(' ', vehicle_location) + 1) + 1,
        LEN(vehicle_location) - CHARINDEX(' ', vehicle_location, CHARINDEX(' ',vehicle_location)+1)-1
    )AS FLOAT
    )AS latitude
    FROM bronze.vehicle
GO

SELECT * FROM silver.vehicle
